architecture_fit.note: Single attention head with triangular prefix mask + fixed Fourier clock readout, no MLP — minimal delta from base_model that exactly computes prefix-sum-mod-V.

baseline_comparison.note: Two ablations (self-only attention, non-periodic magnitude readout) plus random baseline run through the same evaluator, all decaying toward 1/V while the full circuit holds.

faithfulness.note: Purely synthetic circuit, stated explicitly; component ablations through task.evaluate isolate the prefix mask and the clock as load-bearing — the right causal story for a hand-built circuit.

operating_range.note: Flat 1.0 across 4–64 and the mod-V clock is exact at any length, but README/chart overstate the range as '2 orders of magnitude' (4→64 is ~1.2).

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entire mechanism is hand-set weights expressed as CUDA tensors — exactly the hand-built circuit the bonus rewards, reproducing target behaviour at 100%.

visual_judgement.note: Operating-range line, ablation bar at L=16, triangular attention heatmap, and interactive per-position trace together make the claim legible and inspectable.

visualisation_rationale.note: 'Why this visualisation' ties each panel to the goal at the right grain — operating range, causal ablation, literal attention pattern, and a residue-check trace.

notes: An excellent, honest hand-built interpretability attempt: a single-head attention circuit accumulates the prefix sum and a fixed Fourier clock readout performs mod V, hitting 100% accuracy with robustness 1.0 across the sweep and clean component ablations as causal evidence. The only blemish is overstating the operating range as '2 orders of magnitude' when the tested span (4–64) is closer to one. Otherwise near-flawless across architecture fit, baselines, hand-set weights, and visualisation.
